entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Complete all tier 1 cosmetic gaps

TIER 1: CRITICAL COSMETIC (Blocks Mainstream Adoption)
1. Smooth Scroll/Cursor Animation
Gap: Editor jumps line-to-line; no transform: translate3d or equivalent smooth scroll
Market Standard: Cursor has 60fps smooth scroll + caret animation
Fix: Hook WM_MOUSEWHEEL → interpolate scroll delta over 16 frames in RawrXD_Streaming_QuadBuffer.asm
2. Minimap (Code Overview)
Gap: No right-side code thumbnail for navigation
Market Standard: VS Code/Atom minimap with syntax highlighting
Fix: Render scaled-down text cache in Win32IDE_DecompilerView.cpp → side panel
3. Breadcrumbs Navigation
Gap: No symbol path (File > Class > Method) header bar
Market Standard: JetBrains/Cursor clickable breadcrumbs
Fix: Add toolbar to Win32IDE_VSCodeUI.cpp using LSP symbol hierarchy
4. Command Palette Fuzzy Search
Gap: Current ! commands require exact syntax
Market Standard: Fuzzy matching (e.g., "cp" finds "Command Palette")
Fix: Port fzf algorithm to MASM in RawrXD_GSIHash.asm → rank 133 commands by relevance
5. Settings GUI (Not JSON)
Gap: settings.json only—no visual settings editor
Market Standard: VS Code settings UI with search
Fix: Generate property grid from production_config_manager.cpp schemas
6. Welcome/Onboarding Page
Gap: Black screen on first launch
Market Standard: VS Code "Get Started" with interactive tutorials
Fix: Create welcome.html in WebView2 with "Clone Repo / Open Folder / New File" buttons
7. File Icon Theme Support
Gap: Generic file icons in sidebar
Market Standard: VS Code icon themes (Seti, Material)
Fix: Load .ico packs into Win32IDE_Sidebar.cpp imagelist based on extension mapping
8. Drag-and-Drop File Tabs
Gap: Tabs are static; no reordering
Market Standard: Chrome-style tab drag with tear-off
Fix: Handle T_Drag messages in Win32IDE_MultiWindow_Kernel.dll
9. Split Editor (Grid Layout)
Gap: Single editor view only
Market Standard: 2x2, 1x3 splits in VS Code
Fix: Extend QUAD_BUFFER_CTX to support multiple HWND viewports
10. Auto-Update Notification UI
Gap: Silent updates only via SelfPatchEngine
Market Standard: Chrome/Cursor "Update available" toast with release notes
Fix: Add UpdateChecker thread → balloon tip in tray icon'
